name: Smile Digital Health
description: Clinical data repository and health data fabric built on HAPI FHIR, offering cloud, managed and on-premise deployments for payers and providers.

seo.title: Smile Digital Health — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Smile Digital Health: Clinical data repository and health data fabric built on HAPI FHIR, offering cloud, managed and on-premise deployments for payers and prov

when_to_use: HAPI FHIR-based clinical data repository for health systems
Health data fabric connecting clinical systems and analytics
FHIR-native server for large-scale health information exchange
Managed or on-premise FHIR server for US payer and provider
Population health data platform with FHIR-compliant APIs

pros: Built on HAPI FHIR by its original maintainers
Flexible deploy: cloud, on-prem, or managed
Strong HL7 v2 to FHIR translation capabilities
Proven at payer and provider scale
cons: Enterprise pricing prohibitive for smaller orgs
Steep learning curve beyond basic FHIR use
UI tooling less polished than API layer
review.verdict: The reference-grade FHIR repository for serious healthcare orgs, but priced and scoped for payer/provider scale.
review.best_for: Payers, HIEs, and large providers building FHIR-native data platforms
review.not_for: Small digital health startups or teams just needing a FHIR sandbox
